name: Brunch Pizza
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Part Skim Mozzarella Cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the pizza dough out on a 13- by 9-inch pan, baking sheet, or round pizza pan.
2. Cut the ham into strips and place them on the dough.
3. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the ham.
4. In a bowl, combine the egg and milk and beat until blended.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the dough and sprinkle with dried oregano.
6. Bake in a 375-degree oven for 20 to 30 minutes.
One Serving = Calories: 277 Carbohydrates: 15 Protein: 19 Fat: 15 Sodium: 785 Potassium: 206 Cholesterol: 145
Exchange Value: 1 Bread Exchange + 2 Medium-Fat Meat Exchanges + 1 Fat Exchange
